tweaks.name: Hide Dock
tweaks.description: Hides the dock background on the home screen. Warning: this also hides any app icons placed in the dock — move them to the home screen grid before applying. Respring to restore.
tweaks.author: @MinePlayer16

tweaks.name: Hide Home Bar
tweaks.description: Hides the bottom home indicator by zeroing the MaterialKit asset page through Cyanide's native DirtyZero helper. Run alone, then respring. Credits: C4ndyF1sh/ZeroCalories and jailbreakdotparty/dirtyZero.
tweaks.author: C4ndyF1sh, jailbreakdotparty, zeroxjf
